data.content: Fixed terminal tab completion pulse regression by triggering pulse/auto-close only on status transition to completed (not on first-seen completed sessions and not after keep-open cancel). Added completion animation tracker helper + unit tests. Validation: bun run lint (warnings only), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, NODE_ENV=production bun run build. Pushed to origin/main at 5c7cbed.
